item.name: Xanthos Whistle
item.description: This whistle emits a shrill tone that is said to summon Xanthos, the steed of legend.

mount.name: Xanthos
mount.action: Summon forth Xanthos, the legendary steed favored of the primal Garuda. At full gallop, it is said to be the very wind itself.
mount.description: Legend states that the Lady of the Vortex, Garuda, created this magicked steed from a nightmare offered by the Ixal in sacrifice.
mount.tooltip:
Nay is but a hoofbeat
away from neigh!
- Uma Bugyo
